name: LottoGopher Holdings Inc.
summary: LottoGopher Holdings Inc. provides lottery messenger services in California. Its services allow users to order and manage lottery tickets online using a debit or credit card. The company also provides free membership and paid subscription services to conduct its online sweepstakes games. LottoGopher Holdings Inc. was formerly known as Red Hat Investments Inc. The company was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
